SEARCH

Class VoronoiService

java.lang.Object
VoronoiService
public class VoronoiService extends Object
Service class responsible for constructing the Voronoi diagram from a Delaunay triangulation.

Exploits the dual relationship between Delaunay triangulations and Voronoi diagrams: each triangle contributes one Voronoi vertex (its circumcenter), and each pair of adjacent triangles contributes one Voronoi edge connecting their circumcenters.

This class is stateless; all methods operate exclusively on their parameters.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Maissa Tirsane, Anas Chokri, Iyed Souissi, Valery Vo-Van
See Also:
  • Delaunay
  • VoronoiZone

    List<VoronoiZone>

    Generates one VoronoiZone per hospital and populates each zone with the patients whose positions fall inside it.

    getVoronoiEdges(List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
    Produces one Voronoi edge for each pair of adjacent Delaunay triangles.

    Extracts one Voronoi vertex per Delaunay triangle by computing each circumcenter.

  • Constructor Details

    • VoronoiService

      public VoronoiService()

  • Method Details

    • getVoronoiVertices

      public List<Coordinate> getVoronoiVertices(List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
      Extracts one Voronoi vertex per Delaunay triangle by computing each circumcenter.
      Parameters:
      triangles - list of Delaunay triangles produced by Delaunay.triangulate(java.util.List<Hospital>)
      Returns:
      list of Voronoi vertices in the same order as the input triangles

    • getVoronoiEdges

      public List<VoronoiEdge> getVoronoiEdges(List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
      Produces one Voronoi edge for each pair of adjacent Delaunay triangles.

      Two triangles are adjacent when they share exactly two vertices. Only the upper half of the adjacency matrix is visited to avoid duplicates.

      Parameters:
      triangles - list of Delaunay triangles produced by Delaunay.triangulate(java.util.List<Hospital>)
      Returns:
      list of Voronoi edges; empty if fewer than two triangles are present

    • generateZones

      public List<VoronoiZone> generateZones(List<Hospital> hospitals, List<Patient> patients, List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
      Generates one VoronoiZone per hospital and populates each zone with the patients whose positions fall inside it.

      The polygon of each zone is formed by collecting the circumcenters of all triangles that contain the hospital as a vertex. At least three circumcenters are required; hospitals with fewer are skipped.

      Parameters:
      hospitals - list of hospitals acting as Voronoi sites
      patients - list of patients to distribute across the generated zones
      triangles - list of Delaunay triangles computed from the hospitals
      Returns:
      list of VoronoiZone instances; one per hospital with a valid polygon
